test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns a successful response with status 'ok'.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with valid name, bio, and born_year.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without a name returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that authors can be listed with skip and limit parameters.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be retrieved by their ID.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that requesting a non-existent author returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that a 304 Not Modified response is returned when the ETag matches.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that a 412 Precondition Failed is returned when the ETag does not match.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a category can be created with a valid name and description.

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: list_categories
test_cases.description: Verifies that all categories can be listed.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be created with valid data including author_id and category_id.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_author_id_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a non-existent author_id returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be listed with filters such as author_id, category_id, and price range.

test_cases.name: list_books_excludes_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Verifies that soft-deleted books are excluded from the list.

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be retrieved by its ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_gone
test_cases.description: Verifies that requesting a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a review can be created for a book.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_soft_deleted_book_fails
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a review for a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error.

test_cases.name: list_reviews_for_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that reviews for a book can be listed.

test_cases.name: get_book_rating
test_cases.description: Verifies that the average rating for a book can be retrieved.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago.
